name: Grilled Pancetta Crostini with Red Onion Marm
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb pancetta, cut into 1/8-inch thick slices
2 medium red onions, chopped into 1/4-inch dice
2 cups Lambrusco wine, or other light-bodied fruity red wine
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat grill or broiler.
2. To prepare red onion marmalade:
a. Place chopped red onions, Lambrusco, orange juice, and sugar in a saucepan.
b. Heat over medium-high heat until boiling.
c. Reduce heat to medium and simmer for about 30 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the mixture thickens like marmalade.
d. Remove from heat and let cool completely.
3. Place pancetta slices on the grill and cook until golden brown, about 4 to 5 minutes per side. Transfer to a cutting board.
4. Grill bread slices until golden brown and transfer to a serving platter.
5. Spread 3 tablespoons of red onion marmalade on each slice of bread.
6. Chop the warm pancetta into 1/4-inch cubes and divide among the 4 pieces of bread.
7. Serve immediately.
